_comment: Prompts DAW curados para la evaluación de modelos text-to-audio. Compartidos entre modelos para comparación 1:1. Cada modelo genera evaluation/<model>/promptNN/output.wav a partir de cada entrada. BPM y seconds orientativos al DAW (4 compases a X BPM). Algunos prompts incluyen un reference_audio relativo a evaluation/ para el condicionamiento de melodía en MusicGen-melody.

prompts.text: tight acoustic drum loop, 120 BPM, four on the floor kick, snare on 2 and 4, hi-hat eighth notes, dry studio sound
prompts.notes: 4 compases @ 120 BPM = 8.0 s exactos. Comprobar que el loop cierra sin click.

prompts.text: hip-hop drum loop, 90 BPM, boom bap, swung 16th hi-hats, deep 808 kick, fat snare with room reverb
prompts.notes: 4 compases @ 90 BPM = 10.667 s. Boom bap clásico.

prompts.text: funk electric bass loop, 100 BPM, slap bass, syncopated groove, C minor, tight and percussive
prompts.notes: 4 compases @ 100 BPM = 9.6 s. Baseline funk con slap.

prompts.text: lush ambient synth pad, slow attack slow release, C major, ethereal and warm, long evolving texture, no rhythm
prompts.notes: Textura larga sin ritmo. Comprobar calidad de la evolución y ausencia de artefactos.

prompts.text: analog synth lead melody, 120 BPM, saw wave, slight vibrato, A minor scale, punchy attack, 80s style
prompts.notes: Lead melódico. Comprobar si la melodía generada es coherente y musical.

prompts.text: cinematic riser sound effect, 8 seconds, builds from quiet to loud, white noise sweep, ascending pitch, tension
prompts.notes: FX riser para transiciones en REAPER. Comprobar ascenso natural.

prompts.text: dark ambient texture, industrial drone, slow modulation, deep rumble with high frequency shimmer, 20 seconds
prompts.notes: Textura de ambiente oscuro. Sin ritmo definido.

prompts.text: single snare drum hit, cracking, bright, studio recording, no reverb, natural decay
prompts.notes: One-shot de caja. Comprobar attack, body y decay naturales.

prompts.text: electronic arpeggio, 120 BPM, 16th notes, E minor, sawtooth waveform, slightly detuned, driving and hypnotic
prompts.notes: Arpegio rítmico. Verificar si las notas están sincronizadas al BPM.

prompts.text: clean electric guitar chord loop, 100 BPM, jazz chords, Cmaj7 Fmaj7 progression, warm tone, light compression
prompts.notes: Acordes de guitarra jazz. Comprobar si la progresión armónica es coherente.

prompts.text: upright piano loop, 85 BPM, melancholic chord progression, Am - F - C - G, light room reverb, intimate recording
prompts.notes: Loop de piano con progresión Am-F-C-G. Comprobar afinación y musicalidad.

prompts.text: downlifter transition sound effect, whoosh downward sweep, 3 seconds, electronic music production, impactful
prompts.notes: Downlifter para transiciones. Comprobar inmediatez del sweep descendente.
